form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after three months raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 1.3 len this track in a LR on March 11 over 3600m defeating Lili Ball carrying 72kg at $26 in a hurdle. Previously second-up finished second in a small field at Auteuil on September 27 over 3500m, 5 len behind Nirvalla with 71kg at $4.80. Fitter and expected to go on with it.
